pages.text: The mod features 56 new types of fish! They all have different rarities. The higher the rarity, the harder the catching minigame.$(br)$(br)Fishes drop as items to make them easy to sell.
$(l)Choosing a body of water$()$(br)Size matters! If you try fishing in a water body that is too small (for example, a 2x2 hole), fish won't bite.
Instead of fish, you will only catch trash in small puddles:$(br)$(br)• Old Boots$(br)• Iron Scrap$(br)• Seaweed$(br)$(br)Look for large rivers and oceans!
